name: Create new customers or update existing ones in Sage from new accounts in Salesforce

nested.help: Use this to limit the response to Contacts changed since a given date.
nested.name: updated_or_created_since
nested.label: Updated or Created since

nested.help: Use this to limit the response to Contacts deleted since a given date.
nested.name: deleted_since
nested.label: Deleted since

nested.help: Use this to filter out system entities, not applicable for transaction creation.
nested.name: exclude_system
nested.label: Exclude System

nested.help: Specify the attributes that you want to expose for nested entities of the Contacts (expose all nested attributes with 'all'). These are in addition to the base attributes (name, path).
nested.name: nested_attributes
nested.label: Nested Attributes

nested.help: Use this to display the balance for a contact.
nested.name: show_balance
nested.label: Show Balance

nested.help: Use this to determine the correct tax treatment for a contact on a given date.
nested.name: context_date
nested.label: Context Date

nested.help: Use this to filter by the contact name, company name or reference.
nested.name: search
nested.label: Search

nested.help: Use this to filter by the contact person email address.
nested.name: email
nested.label: Email

nested.help: Specify the attributes that you want to expose for the Contacts (expose all attributes with 'all'). These are in addition to the base attributes (name, path).
nested.name: attributes
nested.label: Attributes
